channel.title: INmaster
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INmaster, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The 9 best river cruises for every type of traveler
item.description: Whether you're a foodie, an adventurous traveler, a luxury lover or a first-time cruiser, you can find the right river cruise for you.

item.title: Delta adds 2 Hawaii routes, restores America's longest domestic flight
item.description: Delta Air Lines announced new and returning service to Hawaii beginning in December 2026.

item.title: Capital One airline and hotel transfer partners: How to maximize your miles
item.description: Find out how you can maximize your Capital One miles with airline and hotel transfer partners.

item.title: Weekly Meal Plan #77
item.description: If the thought of figuring out dinner every night is weighing you down, this week’s meal plan is for you.…

item.title: I scored a lie-flat seat across the Pacific for just 75,000 miles by doing this 1 thing
item.description: Setting an award alert helped me book a lie-flat seat from Fiji to Dallas for just 75,000 miles. Here's how the Seats.aero tool works.

item.title: 2-for-1 flights: The best credit cards to earn companion passes and certificates
item.description: Discover the best credit cards offering companion passes and annual companion certificates to help you save when traveling with a plus-one.

item.title: Meta plans to add facial recognition to its smart glasses, report claims
item.description: The feature, internally known as “Name Tag,” would allow smart glasses wearers to identify people and get information about them via Meta's AI assista...

item.title: Good News in History, February 13
item.description: This daily column at GNN.org features all the good news, anniversaries and notable birthdays from this day in history—February 13. The post Good News ...

item.title: Cohere’s $240M year sets stage for IPO
item.description: Cohere surpassed $240 million in annual recurring revenue in 2025, highlighting strong enterprise AI demand as the Canadian startup positions itself f...

item.title: How Ilia Malinin Revolutionized Figure Skating with His Quadruple Axel
item.description: On Friday, the US Olympic skater known as the “Quad God” will compete in his last event of the 2026 Winter Games. Everyone will be watching to see if ...

item.title: Are Waterproof Sneakers Worth It? (2026)
item.description: The idea of having warm, dry feet on your wet, snowy run is appealing. But you might not like the trade-offs.

item.title: Elehear Delight Hearing Aids Review: Good Fit, Poor Sound
item.description: These new in-the-ear aids look great, but quality hearing support just isn’t there.

item.title: Amazon’s Ring cancels partnership with Flock, a network of AI cameras used by ICE, feds, and police
item.description: This news comes less than a week after Ring's Super Bowl commercial stoked controversy over the company's capacity for mass surveillance.

item.title: Monks Arrival After 15 Weeks of Walking Fills DC Streets With Peace and Compassion
item.description: It was a day that some locals said was unlike any other they had ever seen when the party of Buddhist monks arrived barefoot on the steps of the Natio...

item.title: Best Apple 3-in-1 Wireless Travel Chargers (2026), Tested and Reviewed
item.description: Keep your trio of Apple gadgets fully charged wherever you are with these compact folding travel chargers.

item.title: CA Nonprofit Buys 6,100-acres of Sacred Land, Ending 10-year Battle Over Proposed Sand Mine
item.description: One of the largest private land purchases for conservation in California’s Bay Area was just carried out to save a historic ranch from being turned in...

item.title: LGBTQ+ Athletes Are Front and Center at the 2026 Winter Olympic Games
item.description: Nearly 50 out LGBTQ+ Olympians are participating in events throughout the Winter Games—even as their rights to speak and compete are under attack.

item.title: Score, the dating app for people with good credit, is back
item.description: Two years ago, a controversial dating app was launched and quickly shuttered: for people with good-to-excellent credit. Now, the founder is relaunchin...

item.title: Dutch phone giant Odido says millions of customers affected by data breach
item.description: The Dutch phone giant Odido is the latest phone and internet company to be hacked in recent months, as governments and financially motivated hackers c...

item.title: How HIV Affects Older Adults Differently
Exercise Benefits for a Faster Metabolism
item.description: More intense workouts can temporarily raise your metabolic rate. Learn how exercise affects metabolism and which workouts have the greatest impact.

item.title: Reasons Why Women Experience Hair Thinning

item.description: A woman whose new prosthetic leg was swept out to sea is “over the moon” after she found it 10 months later, it having been swept right back to the be...

item.title: Why lunch is the main meal in some countries

item.title: Jobless claims fall to lowest level since mid-May
Jobless claims stay low in latest week
Consumer credit growth soars in December
